title: RevoPurpurUpdater
description: A plugin that updates Purpur, LuckPerms and ProtocolLib automatically when restarting the server.
body:
A plugin that updates Purpur, LuckPerms and ProtocolLib automatically when restarting the server.

By having the plugin you will not need to update these plugins and it will make your work on your server easier, they are plugins that are always updated and take a lot of time away from us.

**Importantly, to work correctly it needs to have the purpur name as server.jar.**

To install, simply place the jar in your plugins folder and restart the server.
